podcasts.title: How to Repair and Nourish Your Gut | Dr. Giulia Enders
podcasts.rawDesc: Dr. Giulia Enders has changed the way millions of people think about the human body. podcasts.title: The Walt Disney Company
podcasts.rawDesc: The Walt Disney Company is the most successful enterprise ever created for monetizing human nostalgia. Today it’s the king of global entertainment, holding the intellectual property rights to the childhood memories of billions of people (including, likely, all of you) and is a reliable, predictable profitable business. podcasts.title: Why One New Drug Takes Ten Years To Make | Mankind x Dr. Reddy's | WTF is Pharma?

podcasts.title: Mental Models That Change How You Think | Bill Gurley
podcasts.rawDesc: Bill Gurley spent years on Wall Street, built his career as a partner at Benchmark, worked through Uber’s hypergrowth era, and now serves on the board of the Santa Fe Institute, where he studies complexity and systems thinking. In this episode, Bill shares the mental models he returns to most, including systems thinking, second- and third-order effects, and the importance of understanding both the bedrock of your field and the bleeding edge. podcasts.title: Vanguard
podcasts.rawDesc: Vanguard is the most effective vehicle ever created for participating in the fruits of American capitalism. Today it’s the single largest equity owner of the majority of corporations in the S&P 500, on behalf of 50 million clients (including, likely, many of you). And yet Vanguard itself is essentially a communist organization — it has no shareholders, makes no profits, and operates more like REI than Fidelity. If you own a Vanguard fund, you own a piece of the firm itself.…
